diagrams.title: Bias-Variance Tradeoff
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between model complexity, bias, variance, and total error. Illustrates the optimal complexity point where total error is minimum.
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the tradeoff between underfitting and overfitting, and finding optimal model complexity

diagrams.title: Overfitting vs Good Fit vs Underfitting
diagrams.description: Three visualizations comparing model fits on the same dataset
diagrams.purpose: Visual understanding of underfitting, overfitting, and optimal fitting in ML models

diagrams.title: Data Quality Challenges Overview
diagrams.description: Shows various data quality issues that affect ML model performance
diagrams.purpose: Identifying and understanding different types of data quality problems in ML

diagrams.title: Machine Learning Challenges Categories
diagrams.description: Four major categories of ML challenges visualized as interconnected circles
diagrams.purpose: Comprehensive overview of all challenge categories in ML
